subject: DevOps
title: Code Quality Gates
description: Learn Code Quality Gates in one minute.

hook.text: Tests pass, but the code is unreadable. No comments, inconsistent formatting, duplicated logic everywhere.

buildup.text: Quality gates go beyond tests. Linters check style. Static analyzers find bugs without running the code.

discovery.text: Code coverage tools measure how much code is tested. A low number is a warning sign, not a target.

twist.text: SonarQube, ESLint, and Checkstyle are popular gates. They block merges until the code meets standards.

climax.text: Quality gates make code reviews faster. Machines catch the obvious issues. Humans review the logic.

punchline.text: Machines check style. Humans check thinking. Better together.

quiz.question: What do quality gates in a pipeline check beyond tests?
options: Code style, static analysis, and coverage metrics
Only whether the code compiles successfully
